title: Is there a way to delete unanswered questions in form viewer?

posts.author: CazAlex (Caroline Moore)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve created a large Comms and Marketing form in which employees can request anything they need from my department.
This includes events, case studies, presentations, PR etc etc…

The type of questions change depending on a conditional question aka Event, Case study…

However, when this pulls through it brings with it ALL QUESTIONS regardless of the condition, meaning there are LOADS of unanswered questions.

Is there anyway to remove the unanswered questions in form viewer?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Caroline! You could apply filtered views to only show items where the column is not empty.

Have you given this a try? Let us know what you think!
